text.title: System Design Process Failure Modes
text.summary: 5 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.fix: Translate to p95 ms + RPS targets before design.

antipattern.symptom: Design proposes Kafka cluster for 5 RPS workload.
antipattern.fix: Compute back-of-envelope; right-size to actual load.

antipattern.symptom: Design has 'boxes-and-arrows' diagram with no scope level marked.
antipattern.fix: Author L1 and L2 explicitly; defer L3/L4 until needed.

antipattern.symptom: Big architecture change merged with no ADR; team relitigates choice 6 months later.
antipattern.fix: Author ADR retroactively; add ADR to merge checklist.

antipattern.symptom: Architect signs off on own design; review skipped.
antipattern.fix: Require independent senior reviewer before package status = Accepted.
